description_long: This is a rectangular, carton-style bottled water package branded as 'Paradise Pomegranate' by Everyday. The front face features a vibrant image of a pomegranate with water splashes, along with bold blue and white text and a green 'Premium Quality' badge. The sides display a barcode, nutritional facts, and multilingual product information, all printed on a predominantly white background with water droplet graphics. The top of the carton is sealed with a folded, pointed spout, typical of Tetra Pak-style packaging, and includes a small, flat screw cap. The surface is glossy and smooth, with clear, high-contrast printing and a modern, fresh aesthetic. The overall appearance suggests a single-use, portable beverage container designed for convenience and visual appeal.
description: A rectangular, glossy white carton of 'Paradise Pomegranate' bottled water with vibrant fruit imagery and detailed labeling. Features a pointed spout and a small screw cap on top.
description_view_0: The top view shows the pointed, folded spout and the small, flat screw cap, with water droplet graphics and some side text visible.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the 'Paradise Pomegranate' branding, pomegranate imagery, and the 'Premium Quality' badge on a white, water-splashed background.
description_view_2: The side view displays the barcode, recycling symbols, and part of the product branding, with water droplet graphics continuing around the carton.
description_view_3: The back view features detailed nutritional facts and multilingual product information, with a clean, white background and minimal graphics.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label features 'EVERYDAY A BETTER DAY' logo in red and gray, large blue and white 'Paradise' text, 'pomegranate' in smaller white text, and a green 'Premium Quality' badge. Side and back panels include nutritional facts, barcode, recycling symbols, and multilingual product info in black and blue text.
attribute_cap_type: Small, flat, white screw cap located on the top spout; circular with subtle ridges for grip.
attribute_transparency: Opaque; the carton material does not allow visibility of the liquid inside.
attribute_bottle_neck_design: Short, pointed, folded spout integrated into the carton top, with a small circular screw cap; no visible threads or flares, typical of Tetra Pak-style cartons.
